name: Double Cheese Wheel
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove any wax coating or rind from the cheese.
2. Hollow out the cheese with a knife or spoon, leaving a 1/2-inch thick shell on the sides and bottom. Reserve the cheese shell.
3. Finely chop enough of the scooped-out cheese to measure 1 cup (reserve any extra for another use).
4. Place the chopped cheese, cream cheese, artichoke hearts, 1 T pine nuts, and basil in a food processor fitted with the steel blade. Process until well mixed.
5. Pack the mixture into the cheese shell.
6. Sprinkle with remaining 1 T pine nuts.
7. Cover and refrigerate until filling is firm (about 3 hours).
8. Cut into thin wedges. Serve with assorted crackers if desired.
